creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Florian Walpen from comment #9)

I tried these commits:
> +PATCH_SITES=  https://github.com/calf-studio-gear/${PORTNAME}/commit/
> +PATCHFILES=   bfb857445e72230659493d3491970e3cb3c7eb9a.patch:-p1 \
> +               b8323d6429eb2d9fef894718789eb350f5b82410.patch:-p1 \
> +               b144a6db375c432df12c5f63b799e288fd28e613.patch:-p1 \
> +               597e48e4b694fe5c0de5804f0c515562cdc4af4d.patch:-p1 \
> +               a64edc8603e99f6cd8de11bbac5b8922541a4aa3.patch:-p1 \
> +               55150be80aa4043b09e85296023959af7fb48e08.patch:-p1

but this still didn't fix it due to issues like this: https://github.com/calf-studio-gear/calf/issues/156#issuecomment-743352804
